# Legends Insurance

> Bilingual independent insurance agency specializing in annuities, life insurance, and employee benefit packages for families and businesses.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Family-first financial protection — annuities, life insurance, and employee benefits tailored to your goals.
- [Services](/services): Insurance and retirement services including HYSA, 401(k), Roth IRA, life insurance, living benefits, term, permanent, IUL, and annuities.
- [Employee Benefits](/benefits): Tax-advantaged employee benefits and Section 125 cafeteria plans for companies with 50+ full-time employees.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles and insights on insurance, retirement planning, and employee benefits.
- [Contact](/contact): Book a free, bilingual consultation on annuities, life insurance, or employee benefit packages.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms and conditions governing use of our website and services.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable sitemap of all public pages and blog posts.
